ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization for the team */,
  "lead_expert_id" TEXT /* ID of the lead expert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experts" (
  "expert_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each expert */,
  "expert_name" TEXT /* Full name of the expert */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization for the expert */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience for the expert */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the expert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the expert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_models" (
  "model_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., machine learning, statistical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_predictions" (
  "iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the prediction is made */,
  "prediction" REAL /* Predicted risk value */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that made the prediction */,
  "submission_id" TEXT /* ID of the submission containing the prediction */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model used for the prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the prediction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso", "year", "submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_predictions_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* ID of the team that made the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the submission was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the submission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the submission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the country accessed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the prediction accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_iso FOREIGN KEY ("iso") REFERENCES countries ("iso")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model output */,
  "model_id" TEXT /* ID of the model that generated the output */,
  "iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the output was generated */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Value of the output */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the output was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the output was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES risk_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_outputs_iso FOREIGN KEY ("iso") REFERENCES countries ("iso")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the query */,
  "iso" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the query was submitted */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date when the query was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the query was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_queries_iso FOREIGN KEY ("iso") REFERENCES countries ("iso")
)
